briefdescription.para: WARNING: This is NOT true flash attention!

detaileddescription.para: This function is named "flash" but implements regular attention with O(n) complexity. It's kept for reference and as a fallback.
TRUE flash attention is implemented in attention_flash_true.c

memberdef.argsstring: (float *Y, const float *X, float alpha, int num_tokens, int dim, int y_stride, int x_stride)
memberdef.name: axpy_2d_f32

briefdescription.para: Batched AXPY for 2D tensors: Y[t,:] += alpha * X[t,:].

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const float *x, float alpha, int n)
memberdef.name: axpy_f32

briefdescription.para: In-place AXPY: y += alpha * x.

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const float *x, float alpha, int n)
memberdef.name: axpy_zero_f32

briefdescription.para: Zero output then accumulate: y = 0; y += alpha * x.

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *A, const void *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_nt_q4_0

briefdescription.para: Matrix-matrix multiply: C[M,N] = A[M,K] @ B[N,K]^T + bias.

parameterdescription.para: Input matrix [M x K], row-major FP32
Weight matrix in Q4_0 format, [N x K] stored row-major
Optional bias [N], NULL if not used
Output dimension (number of rows in B)

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *A, const void *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_nt_q4_1

briefdescription.para: GEMM with transposed Q4_1 weights: C = A @ B^T.

parameterdescription.para: Input activations [M x K], row-major FP32
Weight matrix in Q4_1 format [N x K], row-major quantized
Optional bias [N], NULL if not used

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *A, const void *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_nt_q4_k

memberdef.argsstring: (const void *A_q8, const void *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_nt_q4_k_q8_k

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *A, const void *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_nt_q5_0

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *A, const void *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_nt_q5_1

briefdescription.para: GEMM with transposed Q5_1 weights: C = A @ B^T.

parameterdescription.para: Input activations [M x K], row-major FP32
Weight matrix in Q5_1 format [N x K], row-major quantized
Optional bias [N], NULL if not used

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *A, const void *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_nt_q6_k

memberdef.argsstring: (const void *A_q8, const void *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_nt_q6_k_q8_k

briefdescription.para: NT GEMM: C = A @ B^T where A is Q8_K and B is Q6_K.

detaileddescription.para:
This is the typical inference pattern:
A: Activations in Q8_K format [M x K]
B: Weights in Q6_K format [N x K]
C: Output [M x N]

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *A, const void *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_nt_q8_0

briefdescription.para: Matrix-matrix multiply: C[M,N] = A[M,K] @ B[N,K]^T + bias.

parameterdescription.para: Input matrix [M x K], row-major FP32
Weight matrix in Q8_0 format, [N x K] stored row-major
Optional bias [N], NULL if not used
Output dimension (number of rows in B)

memberdef.argsstring: (const void *A_q8, const void *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_nt_q8_0_q8_0

briefdescription.para: gemm_nt_q8_0_q8_0 with optional bias (matches header signature)

memberdef.argsstring: (float *Y, const void *W, const float *X, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_q4_k

briefdescription.para: Auto-dispatch GEMM based on available SIMD.

memberdef.argsstring: (float *Y, const void *W, const void *X_q8, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_q4_k_q8_k

memberdef.argsstring: (float *Y, const void *W, const float *X, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_q6_k

memberdef.argsstring: (float *Y, const void *W, const void *X_q8, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_q6_k_q8_k

briefdescription.para: GEMM: Y = W @ X^T where W is Q6_K and X is Q8_K.

parameterdescription.para: Output matrix [N x M] in row-major
Weight matrix in Q6_K format [M x K]
Input matrix in Q8_K format [N x K]

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *x, const float *W_gate, const float *W_up, const float *b_gate, const float *b_up, float *output, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_swiglu_fused

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *A, const float *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_tn_avx512

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *A, const float *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_tn_blocked

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *A, const float *B, const float *bias, float *C, int M, int N, int K)
memberdef.name: gemm_tn_parallel

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const float *x, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q4_0

briefdescription.para: Auto-dispatch GEMV.

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const float *x, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q4_k

briefdescription.para: Auto-dispatch GEMV based on available SIMD.

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const void *x_q8, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q4_k_q8_k

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const float *x, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q5_0

briefdescription.para: Auto-dispatch GEMV for Q5_0 weights based on CPU features.

detaileddescription.para:
Dispatch priority (best available):
AVX-512 (512-bit vectors) - Intel Skylake-X+
AVX2+FMA (256-bit vectors) - Intel Haswell+
AVX (256-bit vectors) - Intel Sandy Bridge+
SSE4.1 (128-bit vectors) - Intel Nehalem+
Reference (scalar) - Fallback
Uses ck_features.h for standardized feature detection.

parameterdescription.para: Weight matrix in Q5_0 format [M x K]

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const void *x_q8, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q5_0_q8_0

briefdescription.para: Matrix-vector multiply with Q5_0 weights and Q8_0 input.

parameterdescription.para: Weight matrix in Q5_0 format [M x K]
Number of columns (must be multiple of 32)

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const float *x, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q6_k

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const void *x_q8, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q6_k_q8_k

briefdescription.para: GEMV: y = W @ x where W is Q6_K and x is Q8_K.

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const float *x, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q8_0

briefdescription.para: Auto-dispatch GEMV for Q8_0 weights based on CPU features.

detaileddescription.para:
Dispatch priority (best available):
AVX-512 (512-bit vectors) - Intel Skylake-X+
AVX2+FMA (256-bit vectors) - Intel Haswell+
AVX (256-bit vectors) - Intel Sandy Bridge+
SSE4.1 (128-bit vectors) - Intel Nehalem+
Reference (scalar) - Fallback
Uses ck_features.h for standardized feature detection.

parameterdescription.para: Weight matrix in Q8_0 format [M x K]

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const void *W, const void *x_q8, int M, int K)
memberdef.name: gemv_q8_0_q8_0

briefdescription.para: Matrix-vector multiply with Q8_0 weights and Q8_0 input.

parameterdescription.para: Weight matrix in Q8_0 format [M x K]
Number of columns (must be multiple of 32)

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *image, float *patches, int C, int H, int W, int P)
memberdef.name: im2patch

detaileddescription.para: im2patch: Transforms an image into a sequence of flattened patches.
Image Layout: [C, H, W] (Row-major: W is fastest moving) Output Layout: [num_patches, C * P * P]

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint16_t *image, uint16_t *patches, int C, int H, int W, int P)
memberdef.name: im2patch_bf16

memberdef.argsstring: (float *buf, int num_heads, int tokens, int cache_capacity, int aligned_head_dim)
memberdef.name: kv_cache_repack_head_major_inplace

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *__restrict k_token, const float *__restrict v_token, float *__restrict k_cache, float *__restrict v_cache, int num_kv_heads, int token_index, int cache_capacity, int head_dim, int aligned_head_dim)
memberdef.name: kv_cache_write_head_major

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *d_output, const float *input, const float *gamma, const float *mean, const float *rstd, float *d_input, float *d_gamma, float *d_beta, int tokens, int d_model, int aligned_embed_dim)
memberdef.name: layernorm_backward_kernel

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint16_t *d_output, const uint16_t *input, const float *gamma, const float *mean, const float *rstd, uint16_t *d_input, float *d_gamma, float *d_beta, int tokens, int d_model, int aligned_embed_dim)
memberdef.name: layernorm_backward_kernel_bf16

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *input, const float *gamma, const float *beta, float *output, float *mean_cache, float *rstd_cache, int tokens, int d_model, float eps)
memberdef.name: layernorm_naive_serial_matched_precision

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *input, const float *W_fc1, const float *b_fc1, const float *W_fc2, const float *b_fc2, float *fc1_output, float *output, int T, int aligned_dim, int num_threads)
memberdef.name: mlp_token_parallel

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint16_t *input, const uint16_t *W_fc1, const uint16_t *b_fc1, const uint16_t *W_fc2, const uint16_t *b_fc2, float *fc1_output, float *output, int T, int aligned_dim, int num_threads)
memberdef.name: mlp_token_parallel_bf16

detaileddescription.para: Optimized MLP Forward (BF16 weights, FP32 activations)

This version:
Uses optimized BF16 GEMM directly (no bulk conversion)
Keeps activations in FP32 for GELU accuracy
Vectorized GELU with AVX-512

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *input, const float *W_fc1, const float *b_fc1, const float *W_fc2, const float *b_fc2, float *fc1_output, float *output, int T, int aligned_dim, int num_threads)
memberdef.name: mlp_token_parallel_exact

memberdef.argsstring: (float *output, const float *expert_output, float routing_weight, int hidden_dim)
memberdef.name: moe_accumulate_expert_f32

briefdescription.para: Accumulate expert output: output += routing_weight * expert_output.

parameterdescription.para: Token output buffer [hidden_dim], accumulated in place
Softmax routing weight for this expert

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *d_patches, float *d_image, int C, int H, int W, int P)
memberdef.name: patch2im

detaileddescription.para: patch2im: Accumulates gradients from patches back into the image. (Backward pass)
d_patches: [num_patches, C * P * P] d_image: [C, H, W] (Accumulated)

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint16_t *d_patches, uint16_t *d_image, int C, int H, int W, int P)
memberdef.name: patch2im_bf16

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *x, void *y, int k)

parameterdescription.para: Number of elements (must be multiple of 32)

memberdef.name: quantize_row_q8_k

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *scores, int num_tokens, int n_experts, int k, int *indices, float *weights)
memberdef.name: topk_batched_f32

briefdescription.para: Batched top-K selection for multiple tokens.

parameterdescription.para: Number of experts to select per token
Output: routing weights [num_tokens, k] (can be NULL for no softmax)

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *scores, int n, int k, int *indices, float *values)
memberdef.name: topk_f32

briefdescription.para: Find top-K indices and values from a score vector.

parameterdescription.para: Number of scores (e.g., number of experts)
Number of top scores to select
Output: indices of top-K scores [k], sorted descending by value
Output: top-K score values [k], sorted descending (can be NULL)

memberdef.argsstring: (const float *scores, int n, int k, int *indices, float *weights)
memberdef.name: topk_softmax_f32

briefdescription.para: Find top-K indices with softmax-normalized weights.

parameterdescription.para: Number of top scores to select
Output: softmax-normalized weights for selected [k], sum to 1.0

memberdef.argsstring: (int n, float *s, const void *vx, const void *vy)
memberdef.name: vec_dot_q6_k_q8_k

briefdescription.para: Q6_K x Q8_K dot product (single row)

memberdef.argsstring: (float *y, const float **vectors, const float *weights, int k, int n)
memberdef.name: weighted_sum_f32

briefdescription.para: Weighted sum of k vectors: y = sum_i(weights[i] * vectors[i])

parameterdescription.para: Array of k input vector pointers, each [n]
